title: Custom eggless first birthday cakes for Box Hill and Vineyard families
summary:
A first birthday only happens once. Getting a custom eggless cake there on time shouldn't be the hard part.

Riverstone opens at 6am weekdays — order ahead and collect before work on your way to Box Hill or Vineyard. Free parking at the shopping centre, no circling the block with a cake in the boot.

Every cake is 100% eggless. All 15 flavours, including Rasmalai and Ferrero Rocher, in buttercream, fondant or ganache — not an option, the only way we bake.

48 hours minimum notice. That's what fresh baking actually takes.

WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: Box Hill Vineyard Riverstone cake pickup
